scripts.check:data-tools-review: node --input-type=module -e "const m = await import('data-tools/phb-review'); if (typeof m.createPhbReviewService !== 'function') process.exit(1)"
scripts.ci:portable: npm run test:release-metadata && npm run test:deployment-scripts && npm run test:agents && npm run agents:check && npm run build:contracts && npm run check:contracts && npm run -w server db:generate && npm run build:server && npm run -w server check:runtime && npm run test:server && npm run typecheck:data-tools && npm run test:data-tools && npm run build:data-tools && npm run check:data-tools-review && npm run typecheck:review-console && npm run test:review-console && npm run build:review-console && npm run test:web && npm run typecheck:web && npm run -w web build
scripts.verify: npm run test:release-metadata && npm run test:deployment-scripts && npm run test:agents && npm run agents:check && npm run build:contracts && npm run check:contracts && npm run typecheck:data-tools && npm run test:data-tools && npm run build:data-tools && npm run check:data-tools-review && npm run typecheck:review-console && npm run test:review-console && npm run build:review-console && npm run test:server && npm run test:web && npm run typecheck:web
